---
title: "Overview and Trends at Major Reservoirs"
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plotly = require("https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-latest.min.js")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Data
Res_Elv = (await FileAttachment("Data/Reservoir_Elevation.csv").csv()).map(d => ({
  ...d,
  Year: +d.Year,
  Elevation: +d.Elevation
}))

Res_Stor = (await FileAttachment("Data/Reservoir_Storage.csv").csv()).map(d =>({
  ...d,
  Date: d.Date,
  Elevation: +d.Elevation
}))
```
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| panel: sidebar
viewof reservoir_choice = Inputs.select(
  ["Total", "Lake Mead", "Lake Powell", "Flaming Gorge"],
  { label: "Reservoir:", value: "Lake Mead" }
)
```
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
filtered_elv = Res_Elv.filter(d => d.Reservoir === reservoir_choice)
```

::: {#reservoir-tabset .panel-tabset .ojs-track-layout}

## Elevation
```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const div = html`<div style="width: 1000px; min-height: 750px;"></div>`
  
  Plotly.newPlot(div, [
    {
      x: filtered_elv.map(d => d.Year),
      y: filtered_elv.map(d => d.Elevation),
      type: "scatter",
      mode: "lines",
      name: "Reservoir Elevation",
      line: { color: "blue", width: 2 }
    }
  ], {
    title: "Reservoir Elevation Over Time",
    xaxis: { title: "Year", type: "date"},
    yaxis: { title: "Elevation (ft)" },
    font: { family: "sans-serif" },
    plot_bgcolor: "white",
    paper_bgcolor: "white",
    showlegend: true,
    legend: { x: 1, xanchor: "right", y: 1 }
  })

  return div
}
```

## Storage

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
filtered_stor = Res_Stor.filter(d => d.Reservoir === reservoir_choice)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const div = html`<div style="width: 1000px; min-height: 750px;"></div>`
  
  Plotly.newPlot(div, [
    {
      x: filtered_stor.map(d => d.Date),
      y: filtered_stor.map(d => d.Storage),
      type: "scatter",
      mode: "lines",
      name: "Reservoir Storage",
      line: { color: "blue", width: 2 }
    }
  ], {
    title: "Reservoir Storage Over Time",
    xaxis: { title: "Date", type: "date" },
    yaxis: { title: "Storage (AF)" },
    font: { family: "sans-serif" },
    plot_bgcolor: "white",
    paper_bgcolor: "white",
    showlegend: true,
    legend: { x: 1, xanchor: "right", y: 1 }
  })

  return div
}
```
